mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bpm_form (id, name, status, conf, fields, remark,create_by,create_by_name,create_time ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{conf, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{fields, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )
mapper.update: UPDATE bpm_form SET name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status, jdbcType=BIGINT}, conf = #{conf, jdbcType=CLOB}, fields = #{fields, jdbcType=CLOB}, remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{loginuserid}, update_by_name = #{loginusername}, update_time = #{now} WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, name, status, conf, fields, remark, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, update_by, update_by_name, update_time from bpm_form where id = #{id}

select id, name, status, conf, fields, remark, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, update_by, update_by_name, update_time from bpm_form where id in
#{item}
